_comment: FlowForge MCP Servers — Claude Desktop Configuration
_usage: Copy this file to ~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json (macOS) or %APPDATA%\Claude\claude_desktop_config.json (Windows). Fill in your actual credentials below, then restart Claude Desktop.
_docs: Each server connects Claude Desktop directly to one of your services so you can ask questions like 'How many rows in the orders table?' or 'Did the ETL DAG succeed today?' without opening FlowForge.

flowforge-airflow._description: Query Airflow DAGs, runs, task states and logs

flowforge-sql._description: Query SQL Server — row counts, table data, schema inspection

flowforge-http._description: Make HTTP requests and check API health

flowforge-s3._description: Browse S3 buckets, check file existence, list objects

flowforge-azure._description: Browse Azure Blob Storage containers and blobs

flowforge-sftp._description: Browse SFTP directories and check file existence
